title: Board-Level Success Scorecard
subtitle: Hypothetical KPI framework for CSPD board reporting — derived from profile data, strategic pillars, and sector norms. Not sourced from CSPD internal data.

metrics.label: Total enrolment
metrics.note: 5.7% national Catholic enrolment growth 2021–2025; Western Sydney population growth corridor

metrics.label: Re-enrolment rate
metrics.note: Estimated from sector norms; no CSPD-specific data. Key metric for system stability

metrics.label: New enrolment pipeline
metrics.note: Westmead primary opening 2026; ELC-to-K pipeline across 6 centres

metrics.label: Waitlist demand
metrics.note: Growth corridors (Marsden Park, Penrith, Camden) likely have excess demand; data not public

metrics.label: Uplift framework rollout
metrics.note: Evidence-based teaching framework launched 2025; Patrick Ellis hired Dec 2025 to lead

metrics.label: NAPLAN above national avg
metrics.note: Research shows rising academic outcomes; exact domain-level results not extracted

metrics.label: HSC outcomes
metrics.note: School of Now (SoN) blended delivery for Yr 11-12 specialist subjects; no HSC aggregate data found

metrics.label: Formative assessment maturity
metrics.note: Uplift emphasises formative assessment & cognitive load theory; infrastructure still building

metrics.label: Funding certainty
metrics.note: CSNSW needs-based funding arrangement 2024–2029 provides multi-year recurrent grant certainty

metrics.label: Operating surplus
metrics.note: Capital works (new Westmead school) and active hiring signal surplus capacity; no financials public

metrics.label: Fee collection rate
metrics.note: Modest fees supplement government grants; collection challenges likely in lower-income corridors

metrics.label: Capital investment pipeline
metrics.note: New Westmead primary school (Darcy Road) opening 2026; BGA capital grants

metrics.label: Teacher vacancy rate
metrics.note: Sector-wide teacher shortages; Teacher Scholarship Program (30 places, 2026) signals pipeline investment

metrics.label: Staff retention
metrics.note: No public attrition data; employer brand assessed as strong-in-niche

metrics.label: Professional development
metrics.note: Ann D Clark Lecture series, Uplift coaching, ICT traineeships — sustained PD investment

metrics.label: Leadership pipeline
metrics.note: 9-EGM structure with clear succession pathways; external hire (Ellis from CECG) shows ability to recruit

metrics.label: NESA registration
metrics.note: All schools maintain NESA registration — existential requirement

metrics.label: Child protection compliance
metrics.note: Working with Children Checks, mandatory reporting obligations; no public incidents found

metrics.label: Privacy (student data)
metrics.note: 43,000 minors' data; NSW PPIPA + Commonwealth Privacy Act obligations; no public incidents

metrics.label: Governance modernisation
metrics.note: Incorporated as company limited by guarantee (2023); professional board chaired by Elizabeth Crouch AM

metrics.label: Faith formation integration
metrics.note: Faith formation is the first of six strategic pillars; non-negotiable constraint on all decisions

metrics.label: Community engagement
metrics.note: Education Mass, Bishop's Awards, LIFTED forums, Project Compassion, Parents as Partners

metrics.label: Social justice programs
metrics.note: Project Compassion (Lenten fundraising), Catholic social teaching embedded in school programs

metrics.label: Values-aligned AI adoption
metrics.note: LIFTED AI forum framed AI through values lens — deliberate, cautious approach

metrics.label: Device coverage
metrics.note: MacBooks and Chromebooks across 90%+ of secondary schools

metrics.label: Data intelligence capability
metrics.note: Dedicated EGM portfolio for data intelligence; basic-to-intermediate analytics currently

metrics.label: School of Now platform
metrics.note: Blended online program for Yr 11-12 specialist subjects across campuses

metrics.label: IT leadership
metrics.note: Jackson Chan (Head of Tech Services, ex-Qantas/Vodafone); Jeremy Hind (Head of IT Education Platform)
